name: Giovanni Civello
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing a full set of Imperial Watch armor. Carries a small amount of gold and a spare set of lower-class clothing.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: disciplined, loyal

Role: Imperial guard; later Imperial Legion commander.

Home Location Information: Stationed primarily in the Imperial City. Sleeps in the Bastion and operates out of the Imperial Legion Offices in the Prison District.

Daily Routine: Giovanni wakes at 6am on the second floor of the Bastion. After waking, he travels to the Imperial Legion Offices, where he remains seated for most of the day. At midnight, he returns to the Bastion and goes to bed. During periods of martial law enacted during Light the Dragonfires, he instead remains stationed near the doors to the Imperial Legion Offices in the Prison District.

Equipment and Abilities: Wields a silver longsword. Displays standard Imperial Watch training and equipment.

Personality – Legion Officer: Giovanni Civello serves as an Imperial guard in the capital and later assumes command of the Imperial Legion following Adamus Phillida’s retirement. Public records credit Phillida as his mentor and associate Giovanni with continued opposition to the Dark Brotherhood. His behavior reflects a permanent on-duty presence within Imperial Legion facilities and adherence to Legion authority structures.
author: Bethesda
